originalContent
option.value: Live Slider Sorry! This device does not support Rotation Vector Sensor. Invalid picture path! Setting failed. Please retry! Couldn\'t launch wallpaper chooser. You can still activate Live Slider by choosing \"Live Wallpapers\" in your home screen wallpaper picker. Welcome! *It is required to obtain the device\'s rotation angle data from Rotation Vector Sensor in real time. You can check whether your device supports the sensor by rotating the device and seeing whether the cube below changes its perspective. ]]> Picture Default Custom Range Speed Wallpaper scrolling Pause in battery saver mode Activate Wallpapers Slideshow Settings Preview Please select a wallpapers playlist to enable slideshow! Change Wallpaper Wallpaper Settings thumbnail You can activate and edit wallpapers in this playlist right here and any previous selected wallpaper will be changed respectively. Are you sure you want to disable current Playlist slideshow and continue with current single wallpaper selection… Change Wallpapers Change current wallpaper Double Tap Wallpaper Wallpaper Slideshow Wallpaper changes after some time Pause everything in battery saver mode Power Saver Mode Enable to get scroll effect Wallpaper Scrolling Photos 100+ NA March 24 add wallpaper Slideshow time must be at least 3 seconds. FRONT FACE DEFAULT Default Vertical Dynamic ACTIVE Back Button Help & Information Settings Controls: • Range: Controls the intensity of the parallax effect by zooming the image. Higher values create more movement as the image is translated more on sensor movements, but the image becomes more zoomed for greater bias range. The lowest value (0) completely shuts off the parallax animation with no sensor updates, while slideshow will still work normally. • Speed: Adjusts how quickly the wallpaper responds to device rotation. Higher values make parallax react faster. For normal movements, smoothing is added as device sensor rotation values are not linear to tackle jittery effects. At maximum speed, there is no smoothing - if your device has a good sensor you may not see jittery effects, otherwise you know the drill. • Power Saver Mode: Pauses all wallpaper effects when battery saver is enabled to conserve battery life. • Wallpaper Slideshow: Automatically changes wallpapers from your selected playlist at set intervals. Minimum time interval is 3 seconds for performance reasons and inbuilt Android battery optimizations that freeze update callbacks for animations. • Double Tap Wallpaper: Allows changing wallpapers by double-tapping the screen for quick wallpaper switching. Calibration Modes: • Default: Sets the parallax face as default wherever your phone is facing at the moment. The wallpaper will animate with respect to that initial position. Simple calibration that works well for basic parallax effects. • Vertical: Considers only 2 faces where ground and sky positions are detected. Perfect for users who mainly use their phone facing upwards during normal day usage and facing downwards when lying on the bed. Only recalibrates when switching between upright and upside-down orientations. • Dynamic: Advanced mode that considers all 6 faces of the cube as possibilities. Wherever your phone is facing, the parallax wallpaper origin will update automatically based on the current phone direction (portrait, landscape, flat positions). Provides the most adaptive experience with automatic face detection and recalibration. A helper cube is displayed that shows your current active face position as reference. Got it Transition Animation Style when wallpaper changes Fade Dissolve Pixelate • Transition Animation: Choose the visual effect used when the wallpaper changes. Fade is a simple crossfade, Dissolve crumbles pixels away organically, Pixelate blocks and sharpens the image. Animation Speed Controls transition duration 0.25x (Very Slow) 0.5x (Slow) 1x (Default) 2x (Fast) 3x (Very Fast) 4x (Stupid Fast)

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: Live Slider Sorry! This device does not support Rotation Vector Sensor. Invalid picture path! Setting failed. Please retry! Couldn\'t launch wallpaper chooser. You can still activate Live Slider by choosing \"Live Wallpapers\" in your home screen wallpaper picker. Welcome! *It is required to obtain the device\'s rotation angle data from Rotation Vector Sensor in real time. You can check whether your device supports the sensor by rotating the device and seeing whether the cube below changes its perspective. ]]> Picture Default Custom Range Speed Wallpaper scrolling Pause in battery saver mode Activate Wallpapers Slideshow Settings Preview Please select a wallpapers playlist to enable slideshow! Change Wallpaper Wallpaper Settings thumbnail You can activate and edit wallpapers in this playlist right here and any previous selected wallpaper will be changed respectively. Are you sure you want to disable current Playlist slideshow and continue with current single wallpaper selection… Change Wallpapers Change current wallpaper Double Tap Wallpaper Wallpaper Slideshow Wallpaper changes after some time Pause everything in battery saver mode Power Saver Mode Enable to get scroll effect Wallpaper Scrolling Photos 100+ NA March 24 add wallpaper Slideshow time must be at least 3 seconds. FRONT FACE DEFAULT Default Vertical Dynamic ACTIVE Back Button Help & Information Settings Controls: • Range: Controls the intensity of the parallax effect by zooming the image. Higher values create more movement as the image is translated more on sensor movements, but the image becomes more zoomed for greater bias range. The lowest value (0) completely shuts off the parallax animation with no sensor updates, while slideshow will still work normally. • Speed: Adjusts how quickly the wallpaper responds to device rotation. Higher values make parallax react faster. For normal movements, smoothing is added as device sensor rotation values are not linear to tackle jittery effects. At maximum speed, there is no smoothing - if your device has a good sensor you may not see jittery effects, otherwise you know the drill. • Power Saver Mode: Pauses all wallpaper effects when battery saver is enabled to conserve battery life. • Wallpaper Slideshow: Automatically changes wallpapers from your selected playlist at set intervals. Minimum time interval is 3 seconds for performance reasons and inbuilt Android battery optimizations that freeze update callbacks for animations. • Double Tap Wallpaper: Allows changing wallpapers by double-tapping the screen for quick wallpaper switching. Calibration Modes: • Default: Sets the parallax face as default wherever your phone is facing at the moment. The wallpaper will animate with respect to that initial position. Simple calibration that works well for basic parallax effects. • Vertical: Considers only 2 faces where ground and sky positions are detected. Perfect for users who mainly use their phone facing upwards during normal day usage and facing downwards when lying on the bed. Only recalibrates when switching between upright and upside-down orientations. • Dynamic: Advanced mode that considers all 6 faces of the cube as possibilities. Wherever your phone is facing, the parallax wallpaper origin will update automatically based on the current phone direction (portrait, landscape, flat positions). Provides the most adaptive experience with automatic face detection and recalibration. A helper cube is displayed that shows your current active face position as reference. Got it Transition Animation Style when wallpaper changes Fade Dissolve Pixelate Wipe Blur Zoom • Transition Animation: Choose the visual effect used when the wallpaper changes. Fade is a simple crossfade, Dissolve crumbles pixels away organically, Pixelate blocks and sharpens the image, Wipe sweeps the new image in from the left, Blur softens the old image out then sharpens the new one in, and Zoom grows the new image outward from the screen centre. Animation Speed Controls transition duration 0.25x (Very Slow) 0.5x (Slow) 1x (Default) 2x (Fast) 3x (Very Fast) 4x (Stupid Fast)
